rules.name: AI capex acceleration
rules.thesis: AI infrastructure demand can support revenue growth and pricing power.
conditions: Margins remain stable while capex increases
rules.rationale: Use this rule when the company is a direct beneficiary of AI infrastructure demand.

rules.name: Valuation stretch under slowing growth
rules.thesis: If valuation remains elevated while growth decelerates, downside risk increases.
conditions: Forward growth guidance is revised lower
rules.rationale: Use this as a cautionary overlay when expectations look richer than fundamentals.

rules.name: Balance sheet resilience
rules.thesis: Net cash and strong free cash flow improve resilience during drawdowns.
conditions: Net cash or modest leverage profile
rules.rationale: This factor matters most when macro conditions tighten and durability is rewarded.
